summary.productName: 多使用者協作待辦系統（Trello Lite）
goals: 多成員在同一看板上協作任務，並保持任務狀態與排序一致。
支援註冊登入、專案與成員管理、Board/List/Task 操作、留言與 Activity Log。
以 RBAC、append-only Activity Log 與斷線重連補償維持可追溯的一致性。

narrative.taskDescription: Go from Entry to Landing as visitor.

validations.description: Route changes to / and shows visitor navigation.

narrative.taskDescription: Go from Entry to Login page.

validations.description: Route changes to /login.

narrative.taskDescription: Go from Entry to Register page.

validations.description: Route changes to /register.

narrative.taskDescription: Landing page becomes ready.

validations.description: Landing renders once and keeps visitor-only navigation.

narrative.taskDescription: Landing CTA opens login page.

validations.description: CTA routes to /login.

narrative.taskDescription: Landing CTA opens register page.

validations.description: CTA routes to /register.

narrative.taskDescription: Login page becomes ready for credential input.

validations.description: Inputs, submit and validation area are visible.

narrative.taskDescription: Start the login feature from the login page.

validations.description: Submit becomes non-repeatable while auth runs.

narrative.taskDescription: Return to landing from the login page.

validations.description: Route returns to /.

narrative.taskDescription: Register page becomes ready for account creation.

validations.description: Inputs, submit and validation area are visible.

narrative.taskDescription: Start the register feature from the register page.

validations.description: Submit becomes non-repeatable while registration runs.

narrative.taskDescription: Return to landing from the register page.

validations.description: Route returns to /.

narrative.taskDescription: Fetch the project list for the authenticated user.

validations.description: The request uses authenticated user context.

narrative.taskDescription: Show the empty state when the user has no projects.

validations.description: Project list API returns 200 with an empty collection.

narrative.taskDescription: Show accessible projects for the current user.

validations.description: Only accessible projects are shown.

narrative.taskDescription: Show retryable error state for the project list.

validations.description: Failed load keeps the user on /projects.

narrative.taskDescription: Issue one fresh project-list request.

validations.description: Retry starts a single fresh request.

narrative.taskDescription: Open project creation while the list is empty.

validations.description: Create CTA is available once in the empty state.

narrative.taskDescription: Open invitation review while the list is empty.

validations.description: Only the current user's invitations are loaded.

narrative.taskDescription: Open project creation from the ready project list.

validations.description: Create flow opens once from the ready state.

narrative.taskDescription: Open invitation review from the ready project list.

validations.description: Invitation review stays scoped to the current user.

narrative.taskDescription: Navigate to the owner/admin board variant.

validations.description: Route changes to /projects/:projectId/board with owner/admin controls.

narrative.taskDescription: Navigate to the member board variant.

validations.description: Route changes to /projects/:projectId/board with member task controls.

narrative.taskDescription: Navigate to the viewer board variant.

validations.description: Route changes to /projects/:projectId/board in read-only mode.

narrative.taskDescription: Return to landing after logout.

validations.description: Route returns to / and protected access is removed.

narrative.taskDescription: Return to landing after logout.

validations.description: Route returns to / and project data is no longer accessible.

narrative.taskDescription: Return to landing after logout from an error state.

validations.description: Logout succeeds even from the error state.

narrative.taskDescription: Request append-only log entries for the current project.

validations.description: The request is scoped to the current project.

narrative.taskDescription: Show the empty state when no events exist.

validations.description: The log API returns 200 with no events.

narrative.taskDescription: Show ordered append-only events for the project.

validations.description: Entries belong only to the current project and preserve order.

narrative.taskDescription: Show a retryable error state.

validations.description: No unauthorized project events are shown on failure.

narrative.taskDescription: Reload the activity log for the current project.

validations.description: Retry replaces the error state with a fresh request.

narrative.taskDescription: Request archived project records in read-only mode.

validations.description: No edit controls appear while archived content loads.

narrative.taskDescription: Show the empty archived view when no archived items exist.

validations.description: The archived API returns 200 with no items.

narrative.taskDescription: Show archived project data in read-only form.

validations.description: Only current-project archived records are shown.

narrative.taskDescription: Show a retryable error state for archived data.

validations.description: No writable fallback UI appears on error.

narrative.taskDescription: Reload archived data while keeping the page read-only.

validations.description: Reload keeps archived records non-editable.

validations.description: Failure does not silently apply stale writes.

narrative.taskDescription: Pause writes until a fresh sync occurs.

validations.description: Board is marked stale while disconnected.

narrative.taskDescription: Reload the board after realtime reconnect.

validations.description: Server-authoritative ordering replaces stale local state.

narrative.taskDescription: Retry fetching the board snapshot.

validations.description: Retry issues a single fresh request.

narrative.taskDescription: Open board structure flow from the empty state.

validations.description: Only owner/admin sees this path.

narrative.taskDescription: Open the writable task detail panel.

validations.description: Editor-capable task detail opens for allowed roles.

narrative.taskDescription: Open task creation from the board.

validations.description: Action is offered only on writable lists.

narrative.taskDescription: Open task move flow with drag context.

validations.description: Only non-archived task drag enters the feature.

narrative.taskDescription: Open board structure management.

validations.description: Management controls stay owner/admin-only.

narrative.taskDescription: Open WIP rule management.

validations.description: Only owner/admin can configure WIP rules.

narrative.taskDescription: Go to members page with management controls.

validations.description: Route changes to project activity.

validations.description: Member cannot mutate board state from the error screen.

validations.description: Member sees stale-state indication while disconnected.

narrative.taskDescription: Reload authoritative board data after reconnect.

validations.description: Local stale ordering is replaced by server state.

narrative.taskDescription: Retry fetching member board snapshot.

validations.description: Retry triggers one fresh load.

validations.description: WIP override is not available from member path.

validations.description: Member move flow is limited to non-archived writable tasks.

narrative.taskDescription: Reload read-only board snapshot.

validations.description: Resync preserves read-only behavior.

validations.description: Task detail stays read-only.

narrative.taskDescription: Send one login request with submitted credentials.

narrative.taskDescription: Send one registration request with submitted identity data.

validations.description: Submit remains non-repeatable while registration is pending.

narrative.taskDescription: Route to project list after successful registration.

narrative.taskDescription: Return to registration page after a rejected registration.

validations.description: Route stays on /register.

narrative.taskDescription: Send one project-create request with project draft fields.

validations.description: Default private visibility and active status are applied while pending.

narrative.taskDescription: Project and owner membership are created successfully.

narrative.taskDescription: Creation fails and no project is persisted.

validations.description: Rejected create does not append project creation activity.

validations.description: Only invitations belonging to the current user are loaded.

validations.description: Invited role is limited to admin, member, or viewer.

narrative.taskDescription: Change role for an existing project member.

validations.description: Single-owner constraint remains enforced server-side.

narrative.taskDescription: Submit member removal for the current project.

validations.description: Removal is not committed before server success.

narrative.taskDescription: Invitation is created or updated successfully.

validations.description: Invitation is persisted and audit log is appended.

narrative.taskDescription: Membership role is updated successfully.

validations.description: Role update persists and audit log records the change.

narrative.taskDescription: Member is removed and related task assignments are cleared or invalidated.

validations.description: Removal persists and audit log records the action.

narrative.taskDescription: Invitation creation fails and no invite is stored.

validations.description: Failed invite does not create an invitation or activity entry.

narrative.taskDescription: Role change fails and existing membership stays unchanged.

validations.description: Rejected role change leaves membership data unchanged.

narrative.taskDescription: Removal fails and membership remains authoritative.

validations.description: Rejected removal leaves membership and assignments unchanged.

narrative.taskDescription: Return to owner/admin members page with refreshed member data.

validations.description: Route returns to members page.

narrative.taskDescription: Return to owner/admin members page after failed management action.

narrative.taskDescription: Create, reorder or archive a board or list within the current project.

validations.description: All structure mutations stay scoped to the active project.

narrative.taskDescription: Invalid or unauthorized structure mutation is rejected.

validations.description: Updated WIP rule persists with activity log entry.

narrative.taskDescription: Create a task in the target list without WIP override.

validations.description: Duplicate submit is blocked and member path does not request override.

narrative.taskDescription: Create a task in a WIP-limited list using owner/admin override.

validations.description: Override reason is captured for audit.

narrative.taskDescription: Member create is rejected because destination list exceeds WIP.

validations.description: No task is created when WIP rejection occurs.

validations.description: Override result and reason are recorded in activity metadata.

narrative.taskDescription: Override creation fails and no task is persisted.

validations.description: Failed override create does not append success activity.

validations.description: Route returns to board page.

narrative.summary: Back to member board after success
narrative.taskDescription: Return to member board with new task visible.

validations.description: Route returns to board page.

narrative.summary: Back to member board after WIP reject
narrative.taskDescription: Return to member board with unchanged task counts.

validations.description: Route returns to board page.

narrative.summary: Back to owner/admin board after failure
narrative.taskDescription: Return to owner/admin board with unchanged task ordering.

validations.description: Route returns to board page.

narrative.summary: Back to member board after failure
narrative.taskDescription: Return to member board with unchanged task ordering.

validations.description: Route returns to board page.

narrative.taskDescription: Move a task with source, destination, and target position.

validations.description: Member path does not request WIP override.

narrative.taskDescription: Move a task into a WIP-limited list with owner/admin override.

validations.description: Override reason is captured for audit.

narrative.taskDescription: Task list and position are updated authoritatively.

validations.description: Source and destination ordering are recalculated server-side.

narrative.taskDescription: Member move is rejected because destination list exceeds WIP.

validations.description: Task remains at prior authoritative location.

narrative.taskDescription: Concurrent ordering conflict returns latest authoritative ordering.

validations.description: Pending local move is not treated as committed on conflict.

narrative.taskDescription: WIP-limited move succeeds with override and authoritative reordering.

validations.description: Override reason and result are recorded in activity metadata.

narrative.taskDescription: Concurrent conflict on override move returns authoritative ordering.

validations.description: No override move is treated as committed without success.

narrative.summary: Back to owner/admin board after success
narrative.taskDescription: Return to owner/admin board with refreshed authoritative ordering.

narrative.summary: Back to member board after success
narrative.taskDescription: Return to member board with refreshed authoritative ordering.

validations.description: Route returns to board page.

narrative.summary: Back to member board after WIP reject
narrative.taskDescription: Return to member board with unchanged task location and counts.

validations.description: Route returns to board page.

narrative.summary: Back to owner/admin board after conflict
narrative.taskDescription: Return to owner/admin board showing latest authoritative ordering.

validations.description: Route returns to board page.

narrative.summary: Back to member board after conflict
narrative.taskDescription: Return to member board showing latest authoritative ordering.

narrative.taskDescription: Submit task field updates within the current project.

validations.description: Current task version is carried for conflict detection.

narrative.taskDescription: Task fields persist and task version increments.

validations.description: Updated fields persist with incremented version and activity log entry.

narrative.taskDescription: Version conflict returns latest authoritative task payload.

validations.description: Stale local edit is not treated as committed.

validations.description: Rejected edit leaves task fields and version unchanged.

narrative.taskDescription: Reload task detail panel showing latest authoritative payload.

validations.description: Conflict reload discards stale local edit.

narrative.taskDescription: Reload task detail panel with unchanged authoritative fields.

narrative.taskDescription: Reload task detail panel with unchanged assignee data.

validations.description: Rejected assignment is not shown as committed.

narrative.taskDescription: Submit intended task status transition.

validations.description: Archived tasks cannot be targeted for further transitions.

validations.description: Updated status persists with activity log entry.

validations.description: Illegal transition is not shown as committed.

narrative.taskDescription: Reload task detail panel with unchanged status.

validations.description: Illegal transition is not shown as committed.
